title: Light Norwegian Grapes Stir-fry
description: A light and umami-rich dish featuring grapes with a touch of midnight allure, perfect for satisfying your cravings in an elegant dairy-free-friendly way.

ingredients.name: 1 small red onion, finely chopped
ingredients.notes: Use the sweet part of the bulb.

ingredients.name: 2 cloves garlic, minced
ingredients.notes: Add a touch of depth to your dish.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup white wine vinegar
ingredients.notes: Helps in the umami aspect and lightness of the dish.

ingredients.name: Juice of 1 lemon
ingredients.notes: Fresh citrus to enhance the flavors.

ingredients.name: Salt to taste
ingredients.notes: To balance the sweetness of the grapes and vinegar.

ingredients.name: 4 oz (113g) cashews, roasted and chopped
ingredients.notes: For a crunchy texture and nutty flavor.

instructions: In a large bowl, combine halved green grapes with finely chopped red onion.
Add minced garlic and smoked paprika, toss gently to coat the fruit evenly.
Squeeze in lemon juice and pour in white wine vinegar. Mix well.
Season with salt, taste for sweetness or sourness as needed, and adjust accordingly.
Place the grape-onion mixture on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Roast in preheated oven for 15-20 minutes until slightly caramelized and fragrant.
Gently fold in chopped roasted cashews towards the end of cooking time to keep them crunchy.
Serve immediately or let it cool slightly before serving, garnished with additional lemon zest if desired.
